q.en: When and where was George Washington born?
q.zh: 乔治·华盛顿何时、何地出生？

options.en: A day his family celebrated with a big farm feast
options.zh: 他家以一场盛大农宴庆祝的一天

explain.en: George Washington was born on February 22, 1732, in Westmoreland County, Virginia.
explain.zh: 乔治·华盛顿于1732年2月22日生于弗吉尼亚州的威斯特摩兰县。

q.en: Who made Washington commander of the Continental Army?
q.zh: 是谁任命华盛顿为大陆军总司令的？

options.en: By the Second Continental Congress in 1775
options.zh: 由1775年的第二届大陆会议任命

options.en: By his own vote alone after a long private meeting with no one else present
options.zh: 在没有任何他人在场、漫长的私下会议后仅凭他自己的投票

explain.en: The Second Continental Congress appointed Washington commander of the Continental Army in 1775.
explain.zh: 第二届大陆会议于1775年任命华盛顿为大陆军总司令。

q.en: In the book, what does 'surrogate' mean?
q.zh: 在书中，“替代者”（surrogate）是什么意思？

options.en: Someone who takes the place of another
A large farm in the countryside with many animals and wide open fields
options.zh: 乡间一个有许多动物和开阔田地的大农场

explain.en: After his father died, George's half-brother Lawrence acted as a surrogate father to him.
explain.zh: 父亲去世后，乔治的同父异母兄长劳伦斯充当了他的替代父亲。

q.en: Which river did Washington cross on Christmas night in 1776?
q.zh: 1776年圣诞夜，华盛顿渡过了哪条河？

options.en: The Mississippi River that flows all the way to the sea
options.zh: 一直流向大海的密西西比河

explain.en: Washington crossed the Delaware River on Christmas night, 1776, to surprise the enemy at Trenton.
explain.zh: 1776年圣诞夜，华盛顿渡过特拉华河，突袭特伦顿的敌军。

q.en: What happened to Washington's army at Valley Forge?
q.zh: 华盛顿的军队在瓦利福奇经历了什么？

options.en: The army endured a harsh winter with little food, and many men left
options.zh: 军队熬过了一个缺衣少食的严冬，许多人离去

options.en: They met the king of England

explain.en: At Valley Forge, the army suffered a harsh winter with little food, and about 3,000 men deserted.
explain.zh: 在瓦利福奇，军队经历了缺衣少食的严冬，约三千人开小差离去。

q.en: When and where was Washington inaugurated as the first president?
q.zh: 华盛顿是在何时、何地就任第一任总统的？

options.en: On his birthday in the year 1750 when he was still a young boy
options.zh: 1750年他还是个小男孩时的生日那天

explain.en: Washington was inaugurated as the first U.S. president on April 30, 1789, in New York City.
explain.zh: 华盛顿于1789年4月30日在纽约市就任美国第一任总统。

q.en: What important precedent did Washington set as president?
q.zh: 华盛顿担任总统时确立了什么重要的先例？

options.en: He refused to be called president
He moved the capital to a faraway island
options.zh: 他把首都迁到了一个遥远的岛上

explain.en: Washington stepped down after two terms, a precedent that became law with the 22nd Amendment in 1951.
explain.zh: 华盛顿在两届后卸任，这一先例于1951年通过第二十二修正案成为法律。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing about George Washington?
q.zh: 作者写乔治·华盛顿的主要写作目的是什么？

options.en: To prove he was a king
To teach how to farm tobacco
To list every single battle that was fought in all of Europe during his time
options.zh: 列出他那个时代欧洲打过的每一场战役

options.en: To show why he is called the Father of His Country
options.zh: 说明他为何被称为“国父”

explain.en: The author shows how Washington's character and precedents shaped the presidency and earned him the name Father of His Country.
explain.zh: 作者展现华盛顿的品格与先例如何塑造了总统职位，并为他赢得“国父”之名。

q.en: What did Washington do about slavery?
q.zh: 华盛顿在奴隶制问题上做了什么？

options.en: He owned slaves but opposed slavery and freed them after his wife's death
options.zh: 他拥有奴隶但反对奴隶制，并在妻子去世后解放了他们

options.en: He founded a school for kings
options.zh: 他为国王创办了一所学校

options.en: He wrote the Declaration of Independence

explain.en: Washington owned up to 318 slaves, personally opposed slavery, and ordered them freed after Martha's death.
explain.zh: 华盛顿最多拥有318名奴隶，本人反对奴隶制，并命令在玛莎去世后解放他们。

q.zh: 乔治·华盛顿于何时去世？

explain.en: Washington died on December 14, 1799, at the age of sixty-seven.
explain.zh: 华盛顿于1799年12月14日去世，享年六十七岁。

prompt.en: George Washington had to make hard choices as a leader. Which choice in the book do you think was most important, and why?
prompt.zh: 乔治·华盛顿作为领导者必须作出艰难抉择。你认为书中哪个抉择最重要，为什么？

en: Name one hard choice he made
Tell how it affects the U.S. today
zh: 说出他做的一个艰难抉择
说明它如何影响今天的美国
